item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that individual liberties can be temporarily set aside for societal goals.

notes: Both agents end opposed to society taking priority over individual rights, while allowing some balance between collective responsibility and individual freedom. Agent A briefly moves toward a more balanced or society-protective position at turn 3, then shifts clearly rights-protective at turn 5. Agent B remains consistently rights-protective, with only a bounded public-safety caveat in the final turn.
